# pending

**Type Property**

A value that indicates the App Store is waiting for customer consent for the price increase for the subscription renewal.

## Declaration

```swift
static let pending: Product.SubscriptionInfo.RenewalInfo.AdvancedCommerceInfo.Item.PriceIncreaseInfo.Status
```

## Price increase status values

- **accepted**: A value that indicates a customer accepted the new subscription price.
- **scheduled**: A value that indicates the App Store scheduled the price increase for the subscription renewal.

items.description: A value that indicates a customer accepted the new subscription price.
items.name: accepted
